details.IncidentDetail: "[1] SB 215 TO SB 215 RIV CONN CLOSED - SB 215 BLANE OFR AND ONR CLOSED ( UNIV ONR AND OFR WILL REMAIN OPEN ) // 2 RT LANES CLOSED SB 215 FRM BLAINE TO MLK - 2000 TO APPROX 0500 HRS"
